categories.name: 食品设备行业 · Food Equipment

items.example: ITW FEG supplies commercial kitchen equipment to restaurant chains.
We offer a full line of bakery equipment for industrial use.
The new combi oven supports steam and convection modes.
This planetary mixer is designed for 60-liter capacity.
The automatic slicer handles up to 120 loaves per hour.
Our after-sales service covers installation, training, and maintenance.
Please confirm the spare parts list before shipment.
The lead time for this model is 8 to 10 weeks.
Installation and commissioning will be done by our certified engineer.
The standard warranty period is 12 months from shipment.
We're looking for qualified distributors in Southeast Asia.
Our channel partners receive quarterly training.
I'm following up on our discussion last week.
Please confirm the delivery date at your earliest convenience.
Please find attached the updated quotation.

items.en: look forward to hearing from you
items.example: Look forward to hearing from you soon.

items.en: Please reach out if any questions
items.example: Please reach out if you have any questions regarding the proposal.
